title: Formspec Response
description: A Formspec Response document — a completed or in-progress Instance pinned to a specific Definition version (§2.1.6).

definitionUrl.description: The canonical URL of the Definition.

x-lm.intent: Canonical identifier of the form definition used to produce this response.

definitionVersion.description: The exact version of the Definition against which this Response was created.

x-lm.intent: Exact pinned definition version for validation and replay.

status.description: The current status of this Response.

data.description: The primary Instance — the form data.

x-lm.intent: Primary response payload captured from the form instance.

authored.description: When the Response was last modified (ISO 8601 date-time).

x-lm.intent: Last-modified timestamp for this response record.

author.description: Identifier and display name of the person or system that authored the Response.

subject.description: The entity this Response is about.

id.description: Unique identifier of the subject entity.

type.description: The type of the subject entity (e.g., 'Grant', 'Patient').

validationResults.description: The most recent set of ValidationResult entries (§2.5.1).

ValidationResult.description: A single validation finding produced by constraint evaluation (§2.5.1).

path.description: Dot-notation path to the data node that produced this result.

severity.description: The severity level of this finding (§5.1).

constraintKind.description: The category of constraint that produced this result.

message.description: A human-readable description of the finding.

code.description: A machine-readable identifier for this class of finding.

shapeId.description: If the source is a Validation Shape, the identifier of that shape.

source.description: The origin category of this finding.

sourceId.description: Identifies the origin of the finding (e.g., bind or shape identifier).

value.description: The value that was evaluated when this finding was produced.

constraint.description: The FEL constraint expression that failed. Included for diagnostic purposes.

context.description: Additional context data from the Shape's context expressions.
